steps.title: Convert increases to multipliers
steps.content: A $12\%$ increase means multiplying by $1.12$. A $5\%$ increase means multiplying by $1.05$. To compare $2014$ earnings to $2012$ earnings, multiply the two factors.

steps.title: Find the total multiplier
steps.content:
Compute the product:
$$1.12(1.05)=1.1760$$
So Maya earned $1.1760$ times as much in $2014$ as in $2012$. The answer is D.
